programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: A half-mortal, half-immortal is out to avenge his mother's death and rid the world of vampires. The modern-day technologically advanced vampires he is going after are in search of his special blood type needed to summon an evil god who plays a key role in their plan to execute the human race.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Blade II
programme.desc: Exploding from the pages of Marvel Comics comes the thrilling follow-up to the blockbuster "Blade." Half Man ... half vampire, and consumed by a desire to avenge the curse of his birth and save the human race from a blood-drenched Armageddon. In this newest action-packed adventure, Blade (Wesley Snipes) is forced to team up with the very vampires he hates in order to overcome a new type of monster which threatens to eradicate both races.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Blade: Trinity
programme.desc: The war between humans and vampires continues, but the humans' best hope, human-vampire hybrid warrior Blade (Wesley Snipes), has been framed for countless murders, turning popular sentiment against him. The vampire leader responsible for Blade's bad publicity is Danica Talos (Parker Posey), who's determined to finally lead her bloodthirsty compatriots to victory. Now Blade must team up with a band of rogue vampire hunters (Ryan Reynolds, Jessica Biel) to save humanity.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lovesick man finds unexpected results when he buys a potion from a stranger to help woo the woman he desires.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A downed bomber pilot crash-lands in the desert; when he regains consciousness he can not find any of his crew members.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A wax-museum employee (Martin Balsam) moves the figures of several notorious murderers into the basement of his home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A distinguished but aging actor is thrust into the days of his youth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An unscrupulous traveling salesman sells some magic dust he claims will save a man due to hang for killing a little girl during a drunken spree.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Parents raise their daughter (Ann Jillian) without verbal communication in order to fully develop her telepathic powers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An impoverished pawnbroker is granted four wishes by a genie in a bottle; it's not just that his wishes ended up not being what he expected it's what they did end up being.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bad-tempered writer is convinced the machines in his home are conspiring to destroy him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Newlywed Alex Walker returns to his home and yearns for the days of his childhood.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ghost Voyage
programme.desc: Seven strangers awake aboard a haunted cargo ship adrift at sea.

programme.title: The Turning
programme.desc: Kate Mandell takes a job as a nanny for two young orphans at an isolated Gothic mansion in the Maine countryside. She soon learns that the children -- Miles and Flora -- are emotionally distant and unstable. When strange events start to plague Kate and the siblings, she begins to suspect that the estate's dark corridors are home to a malevolent entity.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: Twelve strangers wake up in a clearing. They don't know where they are, or how they got there. In the shadow of a dark internet conspiracy theory, ruthless elitists gather at a remote location to hunt humans for sport. But their master plan is about to be derailed when one of the hunted, Crystal, turns the tables on her pursuers.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: It's been 40 years since Laurie Strode survived a vicious attack from crazed killer Michael Myers on Halloween night. Locked up in an institution, Myers manages to escape when his bus transfer goes horribly wrong. Laurie now faces a terrifying showdown when the masked madman returns to Haddonfield, Ill. -- but this time, she's ready for him.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Blade: Trinity
programme.desc: The war between humans and vampires continues, but the humans' best hope, human-vampire hybrid warrior Blade (Wesley Snipes), has been framed for countless murders, turning popular sentiment against him. The vampire leader responsible for Blade's bad publicity is Danica Talos (Parker Posey), who's determined to finally lead her bloodthirsty compatriots to victory. programme.title: Silent Night
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a man witnesses the death of his young son when the boy gets caught in crossfire between warring gangs. Recovering from a wound that cost him his voice, he soon embarks on a bloody and grueling quest to punish those responsible.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Callen pursues every alternative when his father is apprehended as part of a planned exchange for two American photographers held hostage in Iran.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: While investigating a missing person's case, the team uncovers a killer who puts on shows for high-paying voyeurs; Mosley assigns Callen as her partner on a joint ATF mission to apprehend someone from her past.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A notorious international weapons dealer returns to the states; Eric must go under cover at a bank.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Sam and Hidoko are sent under cover after a cryptocurrency farm is robbed of over $10 million in bitcoin codes.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Saban's Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five ordinary teens must become something extraordinary when they learn that their small town of Angel Grove - and the world - is on the verge of being obliterated by an alien threat. Chosen by destiny, our heroes quickly discover they are the only ones who can save the planet. But to do so, they will have to overcome their real-life issues and before it's too late, band together as the Power Rangers.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Freaky
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Millie Kessler spends her days trying to survive high school and the cruel actions of the popular crowd. But when she becomes the latest target of the Butcher, the town's infamous serial killer, her senior year becomes the least of her worries. When the Butcher's mystical dagger causes him and Millie to magically switch bodies, the frightened teen learns she has just 24 hours to get her identity back before she looks like a middle-aged maniac forever.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: It's been 40 years since Laurie Strode survived a vicious attack from crazed killer Michael Myers on Halloween night. Locked up in an institution, Myers manages to escape when his bus transfer goes horribly wrong. Laurie now faces a terrifying showdown when the masked madman returns to Haddonfield, Ill. -- but this time, she's ready for him.

programme.title: Silent Night

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: Adaptation of the first of J.K. Rowling's popular children's novels about Harry Potter, a boy who learns on his eleventh birthday that he is the orphaned son of two powerful wizards and possesses unique magical powers of his own. He is summoned from his life as an unwanted child to become a student at Hogwarts, an English boarding school for wizards. There, he meets several friends who become his closest allies and help him discover the truth about his parents' mysterious deaths.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: The follow-up to "Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone" finds young wizard Harry Potter and his friends, Ron and Hermione, facing new challenges during their second year at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry as they try to discover a dark force that is terrorizing the school.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

But to do so, they will have to overcome their real-life issues and before it's too late, band together as the Power Rangers.
